[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111111 a
2 11111111 a
3 11111111 a
4 11111111 a
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11011111 7

01 10 11101001 5
12 21 11110000 4
23 32 10110010 4
34 43 10011110 5
45 54 11011111 7 match 7
56 65 11011011 6
67 76 11011111 7 match 7
70 07 11111111 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6

24 42 10111110 6

37 73 00011110 4
